title: 01163_Multi-Epoch_Matrix_Factorization_Mechanisms_for_Private_Machine_Learning
positive_examples: Enables privacy-preserving machine learning with rigorous differential privacy (DP) guarantees.
Improves privacy-utility tradeoffs in machine learning settings.
negative_examples: High computation required to generate optimal matrices may limit accessibility.
Current inability to train high-utility ML models with tight DP guarantees < 1 in many real-world settings without large amounts of public data may lead to privacy leakage.
